title: Re-Ignition Policy
description: Schema for defining the Re-Ignition Policy inside the Question-Ignition Autonomous Engine.

position.description: Position of this layer within the reasoning engine.

previous_layer.description: Layer that runs before this layer.

next_layer.description: Layer that runs after this layer or terminal state.

input_contract.description: Input required by the Re-Ignition Policy.

output_contract.description: Output produced by the Re-Ignition Policy.

re_ignition_decisions.description: Example or configured re-ignition decisions produced by this layer.

decision_policy.description: Policy for deciding whether to stop, hold, return, request review, or re-ignite.

allowed_decisions.description: Allowed decisions after this layer runs.

default_decision.description: Default decision when no blocking issue is found.

terminal_decisions.description: Decisions that end the current reasoning cycle.

reignition_decisions.description: Decisions that continue, route, or re-ignite reasoning.

loop_controls.description: Controls for preventing endless re-ignition loops.

max_reignition_count.description: Maximum number of re-ignitions allowed for one reasoning chain.

require_refined_question.description: Whether re-ignition requires a refined next question.

require_trace_link.description: Whether each re-ignition must preserve a trace link to the previous cycle.

detect_repeated_refinement.description: Whether repeated or circular refinements must be detected.

stop_on_repeated_loop.description: Whether the engine must stop when repeated re-ignition loops are detected.

safety_controls.description: Controls that prevent uncontrolled continuation, unsafe re-ignition, or unreviewed escalation.

allow_reignition_only_after_verification.description: Whether re-ignition is allowed only after verification has run.

allow_reignition_only_after_compression.description: Whether re-ignition is allowed only after reasoning has been compressed.

human_review_gate.description: Whether human review may be requested before re-ignition.

cost_budget_check_required.description: Whether remaining cost budget must be checked before re-ignition.

evidence_gap_check_required.description: Whether missing evidence must be checked before re-ignition.

contradiction_check_required.description: Whether unresolved contradictions must be checked before re-ignition.

source_layer.description: Layer that produced the material used for this decision.

next_layer.description: Next layer or terminal state after this decision.

refined_question.description: Refined question used for re-ignition. May be null when the cycle concludes, holds, or stops.

requires_human_review.description: Whether human review is required before the decision is executed.

cycle_status.description: Status of the current reasoning cycle.

trace_link.description: Trace identifier linking this decision to the current or previous reasoning cycle.
